git.tag_owner_note: Run scripts/verify-v0.3.2-alpha-private-packs.py --expected-sha <tag-target-sha> immediately before pushing the tag. Refresh git.sha if the merge strategy changes the tag target.

public.title: private team pack cross-repo fixture E2E
private pack setup, diagnostics, and support bundle integration

private_registry.title: private pack entitlement and plan gates

distribution.pypi_deferral: PyPI is not the supported v0.3.2-alpha distribution path because router skills, installers, schemas, docs, and repo assets must be present beside the checkout.

feature_scope: registered private team pack client commands
private team pack setup wizard checks
service diagnostics and doctor private-pack counters
cross-repo private team pack fixture E2E
v0.3.2-alpha private pack release smoke and verifier
known_limitations: Developer preview, not a production SLA.
PyPI is not the supported v0.3.2-alpha distribution path.
Private team pack hosted operations require registry-side entitlement or Business/Enterprise plan.
Private registry PR #26 and PR #27 must be accepted for production private-pack publishing and entitlement gates.
Archive bytes are SHA256-verified and safely extracted, not archive-byte signed.
Support bundle output is redacted and local; users decide whether to share it.
release_owner_actions: Review and merge required public and private registry PRs in dependency order.
Refresh git.sha if the merge strategy changes the final tag target.
Create tag v0.3.2-alpha only after human release-owner approval.
Create a GitHub prerelease with docs/releases/v0.3.2-alpha.md as release notes.
